---
title: 2019 DS Bowl - Part 4 - A deeper exploration of game structure
author: ~
date: '2019-11-02'
slug: 2019-data-science-bowl-part-4
categories: ['Analysis']
tags: ['R', 'kaggle', 'data science bowl']
description: 'Part 4 of a series on my contribution to the 2019 Data Science Bowl'
disableComments: no
bestof: yes
---

<script> 
  window.location.replace("https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-4-more-on-game-sessions.html");
</script>

## Go here: [https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-4-more-on-game-sessions.html](https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-4-more-on-game-sessions.html)
